I design and build scalable web applications with a strong focus on backend architecture, API design, and responsive frontend engineering. From secure REST APIs to dynamic UI systems, I craft software that performs reliably under real-world conditions.

01 / About

Who Am I?

Full Stack Developer focused on building scalable, high-performance web applications using Java, Spring Boot, React, and PHP (CodeIgniter). Passionate about clean architecture, performance optimization, and creating seamless user experiences. Strong believer in systems thinking and continuous learning.

I specialize in developing secure and scalable applications, from e-commerce platforms to data-driven web solutions. My recent work includes backend security enhancements, real-time applications, and cloud integrations.

04 / Experience

Career Journey

Frontend Intern
SalesQueen Software Solutions
May 2024 - Aug 2024

Worked on frontend development using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap. Collaborated on website projects to enhance UI/UX and responsiveness.

Backend Intern
SalesQueen Software Solutions
Sep 2024 - Dec 2024

Focused on backend development with PHP and MySQL using CodeIgniter framework. Implemented secure database management and API integrations.

Full Stack DeveloperCurrent
SalesQueen Software Solutions
Jan 2025 - Present

Transitioned to a full-time role as a Full Stack Developer, building scalable web applications and handling both frontend and backend tasks.
